violations.description: Contaminated food disposition. — --Food * from an unapproved source was not discarded as required. - Expired milk (19 FEB 2026) found in the refrigerator.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - clean in place equipment cabinets, doors, handles and other pieces of equipment in the kitchen are dirty and greasy.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration * . - Sanitizer for dishwasher was empty.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. - Dishwasher not being maintained and checked frequently for sanitizer concentration.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls and floors in the kitchen dirty and caked with grease.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
